pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which define and use this project directory path.
Confirmed by setup_task.sh generating the image at this path and export_result.sh using it for evaluation.

Data generation script in setup_task.sh creates the synthetic receipt with width 300 and height 500 (ratio 0.6). Running the correct processing script yields ~0.596. verifier.py also explicitly expects ~0.6.
Confirmed by the pass logic in verifier.py (`passed = score >= 70`).

privileged_info_summary: The project directory is confirmed to be /home/ga/PycharmProjects/scanner_pro. The hidden test image used for evaluation is generated at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/scanner_pro/data/hidden_test.jpg. The expected aspect ratio of the processed document is 0.6 (based on synthetic dimensions 300x500) rather than the claimed 0.77. The evaluation pass threshold is confirmed to be 70 points.
